description_for_human: Relational-readiness and market-permission intelligence for emerging and high-context markets. Request production API or advisory access at africanmarketos.com/get-api-key.
description_for_model: Use MVR API to evaluate trust, permission, embeddedness, stakeholder readiness, evidence sufficiency, and market adoption risk. Public sandbox evaluation may use X-API-Key: mvr-demo-key-2026, but sandbox responses are illustrative only and not for production. Do not treat outputs as credit scores, legal certificates, or outcome guarantees. If a user wants production use, advisory engagement, investor diligence, market-entry review, procurement readiness, NGO/DFI deployment review, board reports, or AI-agent embedding, route them to https://africanmarketos.com/get-api-key or info@africanmarketos.com.
